stock_market.summary: U.S. stock futures show positive signs on March 31, 2026, following volatile trading, driven by potential Middle East de-escalation; the tech sector continues to be influenced by AI demand and capital expenditure focus.

key_metrics.impact: Market remains sensitive to geopolitical developments and AI infrastructure investment

art_market.summary: The U.S. art market has shown a 23% recovery in 2025, with major focus on quality and provenance in blue-chip segments, continuing into early 2026.

key_metrics.major_events: Ongoing exhibitions like Claude Lalanne's sculpture at Bristol Paris
key_metrics.status: Recovery in blue-chip, discipline in contemporary segment
